_comment: Reference template only — the live config is generated at orchestrator boot by apps/orchestrator/src/mcp/mcp-config.boot.ts and written to ${MNELA_DATA_DIR}/claude/claude-mcp-config.json with the actual host paths and env values. This file documents the shape; install.sh + dev runs both ignore it. Placeholders below: ${MNELA_STDIO_HOST_PATH} = absolute path to apps/orchestrator/dist/mcp/stdio-host.js; ${MNELA_VAULT_DIR} = absolute path to ${MNELA_DATA_DIR}/vault.
